---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea, or discuss a roadmap item
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the use case or gap.

**Where does this fit in the roadmap?**
Check `README.md`'s Roadmap table -- does this belong to an existing
upcoming milestone (9-12), or is it genuinely new scope? If new, explain
why it's worth adding rather than deferring.

**Proposed approach (optional)**
If you have a specific implementation idea, sketch it here. Non-trivial
proposals will likely need an ADR before implementation -- see
`docs/adr/` for the format.
